1| ---
2| name: npa-alerts
3| description: NPA property alert system. Scans LED + SAM databases for newly added properties, best deals, properties near BTS/MRT, and upcoming auctions. Can generate daily reports and run on schedule.
4| ---
5| 
6| # NPA Alerts
7| 
8| Automated alert system for NPA property opportunities from LED and SAM databases.
9| 
10| ## Commands
11| 
12| All commands run from `scripts/` directory:
13| 
14| ### New Properties (last N hours)
15| ```bash
16| python alert.py new --hours 24               # Last 24 hours
17| python alert.py new --hours 48 --source sam  # SAM only, last 48h
18| python alert.py new --json                   # JSON output
19| ```
20| 
21| ### Best Deals (biggest discount vs enforcement officer appraisal)
22| ```bash
23| python alert.py deals --min-discount 30 --limit 20   # >30% below appraisal
24| python alert.py deals --max-price 5000000            # Under ฿5M
25| ```
26| 
27| ### Near BTS/MRT (SAM properties with GPS)
28| ```bash
29| python alert.py bts --meters 500 --limit 20   # Within 500m of any station
30| python alert.py bts --meters 1000 --max-price 3000000  # Under ฿3M within 1km
31| ```
32| 
33| ### Upcoming Auctions (LED)
34| ```bash
35| python alert.py upcoming --days 14            # Next 2 weeks
36| python alert.py upcoming --days 30 --province "กรุงเทพ"  # Bangkok only
37| ```
38| 
39| ### Full Daily Report
40| ```bash
41| python alert.py report                        # All sections combined
42| ```
43| 
44| ## Alert Sections
45| 
46| | Section | Source | Description |
47| |---------|--------|-------------|
48| | New Properties | LED + SAM | Properties added in last 24h |
49| | Best Deals | LED | Properties >30% below enforcement officer appraisal |
50| | Near BTS/MRT | SAM | Properties within 500m of transit (has GPS) |
51| | Upcoming Auctions | LED | Properties with auction dates in next 30 days |
52| 
53| ## Data Sources
54| 
55| - **LED (กรมบังคับคดี)**: Court-ordered property auctions. Price in satang. Uses `enforcement_officer_price_satang` as appraisal reference.
56| - **SAM (บสส.)**: Government asset management direct sales. Price in baht. Has GPS coordinates for distance-to-transit calculations.
57| 
58| ## Transit Stations
59| 
60| Hardcoded BTS/MRT stations for distance calculations. Covers:
61| - BTS Sukhumvit Line (สยาม → สมุทรปราการ)
62| - BTS Silom Line (สยาม → สำโรง + กรุงธนบุรี extension)
63| - BTS Northern Extension (หมอชิต → สายหยุด)
64| - MRT Blue Line (สวนจตุจักร → แบริ่ง + ลุมพินี → สามย่าน)
65| - MRT Purple Line connection (บางซื่อ)
66| 
67| ## Notes
68| 
69| - LED properties don't have GPS coordinates in current schema — transit alerts only work for SAM
70| - LED `next_auction_date` is stored as varchar (not date) — queries cast to date
71| - Enforcement officer price (`enforcement_officer_price_satang`) serves as the appraisal baseline for LED deals
72| - Very high discounts (>90%) are normal for properties that have gone through many auction rounds

(End of file — 72 lines total)
Running the full daily report now.

1| ---
2| name: npa-adapter
3| description: Unified query layer across all NPA providers (LED, SAM, BAM, JAM, KTB, KBank). Search, filter, and compare properties from any source through one interface. Each provider keeps its own table — this adapter reads from all of them and normalizes into a common shape.
4| ---
5| 
6| # NPA Adapter — Unified Property Query
7| 
8| ## Overview
9| 
10| Query layer that sits on top of all provider tables without changing them. Normalizes field names, price units (LED satang → baht), location columns, and GPS availability into a single `NpaProperty` shape.
11| 
12| ## Providers
13| 
14| | Source | Table | Price Unit | GPS | Business ID | Notes |
15| |--------|-------|-----------|-----|-------------|-------|
16| | LED | `properties` + `led_properties` | satang (÷100) | No | internal | Court auctions, case/deed info |
17| | SAM | `sam_properties` | baht | Yes | `sam_id` (unique) | Government NPA, auction/direct sale |
18| | BAM | `bam_properties` | baht | Yes | `asset_no` (unique) | PK is internal `id`; always key by `asset_no` |
19| | JAM | `jam_properties` | baht | Yes | `asset_id` (PK) | Housing finance, rental data |
20| | KTB | `ktb_properties` | baht | Yes | `coll_grp_id` (PK) | Krung Thai Bank NPA |
21| | KBANK | `kbank_properties` | baht | Yes | `property_id` (PK, string) | KBank NPA, promotion prices |
22| 
23| ## Commands
24| 
25| ### Search across providers
26| ```bash
27| # All providers, Bangkok condos under 3M
28| python scripts/query.py search --province กรุงเทพ --type คอนโด --max-price 3000000
29| 
30| # Only LED + SAM
31| python scripts/query.py search --province นนทบุรี --sources LED,SAM
32| 
33| # Keyword search, sorted by price desc
34| python scripts/query.py search --keyword สุขุมวิท --sort price --desc
35| 
36| # JSON output for piping
37| python scripts/query.py search --province ชลบุรี --max-price 5000000 --json
38| ```
39| 
40| ### Upcoming LED auctions
41| ```bash
42| # Auctions in the next 30 days (default)
43| python scripts/query.py upcoming
44| 
45| # Bangkok auctions in the next 14 days
46| python scripts/query.py upcoming --days 14 --province กรุงเทพ
47| 
48| # JSON output
49| python scripts/query.py upcoming --days 60 --limit 50 --json
50| ```
51| 
52| ### Price statistics by area and type
53| ```bash
54| # All providers, all regions
55| python scripts/query.py price-stats
56| 
57| # Bangkok condos across all bank providers
58| python scripts/query.py price-stats --province กรุงเทพ --type คอนโด
59| 
60| # LED only, Chiang Mai
61| python scripts/query.py price-stats --province เชียงใหม่ --sources LED
62| 
63| # JSON output
64| python scripts/query.py price-stats --province นนทบุรี --json
65| ```
66| 
67| ### Per-provider stats
68| ```bash
69| python scripts/query.py stats
70| python scripts/query.py stats --json
71| ```
72| 
73| ### Cross-provider summary
74| ```bash
75| python scripts/query.py summary
76| python scripts/query.py summary --json
77| ```
78| 
79| ## Python API
80| 
81| ```python
82| from adapter import search, stats, summary, upcoming_auctions, price_stats
83| from models import SearchFilters, Source
84| 
85| # Search BAM + JAM for Bangkok condos
86| results = search(SearchFilters(
87|     province="กรุงเทพ",
88|     property_type="คอนโด",
89|     max_price=3_000_000,
90|     sources=[Source.BAM, Source.JAM],
91| ))
92| for p in results:
93|     print(f"[{p.source.value}] {p.price_display} | {p.location_display}")
94| 
95| # LED auctions within the next 14 days
96| auctions = upcoming_auctions(days=14, province="กรุงเทพ", limit=50)
97| for p in auctions:
98|     print(f"{p.next_auction_date} | {p.source_id} | {p.price_display}")
99| 
100| # Price stats: Bangkok condos across LED + BAM
101| rows = price_stats(SearchFilters(province="กรุงเทพ", property_type="คอนโด", sources=[Source.LED, Source.BAM]))
102| for r in rows:
103|     print(f"[{r['source']}] {r['province']} > {r['district']} | {r['count']} props | med ฿{r['median_price_baht']:,.0f}")
104| ```
105| 
106| ## Normalized fields
107| 
108| All `NpaProperty` instances have:
109| - `price_baht` — always in baht (LED auto-converted from satang)
110| - `discount_pct` — computed where appraisal is available
111| - `size_wa` / `size_sqm` — separated correctly (LED condo ตร.ม. fix applied)
112| - `lat` / `lon` — where available (LED has no GPS)
113| - `extra` dict — provider-specific fields (grade, case_number, deed_type, etc.)
114| 
115| ## Search parameters
116| 
117| | Param | Description |
118| |-------|-------------|
119| | `--province` | Province name (partial, case-insensitive) |
120| | `--district` | District (partial) |
121| | `--subdistrict` | Sub-district (partial) |
122| | `--min-price` | Min price in baht |
123| | `--max-price` | Max price in baht |
124| | `--type` | Property type (partial, e.g. คอนโด, ที่ดิน, บ้าน) |
125| | `--keyword` | Free-text search across address/remarks/project |
126| | `--sources` | Comma-separated provider list (default: all) |
127| | `--sort` | price, province, newest |
128| | `--desc` | Sort descending |
129| | `--limit` | Max results per provider (default: 20) |
130| | `--json` | JSON output |

(End of file — 130 lines total)

import psycopg2, json

conn = psycopg2.connect('dbname=npa_kb')
cur = conn.cursor()

# --- All KBANK new properties with location data ---
cur.execute("""
SELECT property_id, promotion_price, sell_price, useable_area, building_th, building_age, 
       lat, lon, province_name, amphur_name, bedroom, bathroom, property_type_name,
       CASE WHEN useable_area > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(promotion_price, sell_price) / useable_area)::numeric, 0) ELSE 0 END as psqm
FROM kbank_properties 
WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours'
  AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lon IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY province_name, amphur_name
""")
rows = cur.fetchall()
print(f"KBANK new with coords: {len(rows)}")
for r in rows:
    pid, promo, sell, sqm, bldg, age, lat, lon, prov, amp, br, ba, ptype, psqm = r
    price = float(promo or sell or 0)
    print(f"  {pid}: ฿{price:,.0f} | {float(sqm or 0):.0f}sqm | ฿{float(psqm or 0):,.0f}/sqm | {bldg or '-'} | {age or '-'}yr | {prov}/{amp} | ({float(lat):.4f},{float(lon):.4f}) | {ptype or '-'} | BR{br or '-'}")

print("\n--- KBANK in Songkhla/Hat Yai ---")
cur.execute("""
SELECT property_id, promotion_price, sell_price, useable_area, building_th, building_age, 
       lat, lon, province_name, amphur_name, bedroom, property_type_name,
       CASE WHEN useable_area > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(promotion_price, sell_price) / useable_area)::numeric, 0) ELSE 0 END as psqm
FROM kbank_properties 
WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours'
  AND (province_name ILIKE '%สงขลา%' OR amphur_name ILIKE '%หาดใหญ่%')
""")
for r in cur.fetchall():
    pid, promo, sell, sqm, bldg, age, lat, lon, prov, amp, br, ptype, psqm = r
    price = float(promo or sell or 0)
    print(f"  {pid}: ฿{price:,.0f} | {float(sqm or 0):.0f}sqm | ฿{float(psqm or 0):,.0f}/sqm | {bldg or '-'} | {age or '-'}yr | {prov}/{amp} | ({float(lat or 0):.4f},{float(lon or 0):.4f}) | {ptype or '-'}")

print("\n--- JAM new (last 26h) ---")
cur.execute("""
SELECT asset_id, asset_no, selling, discount, meter, project_th, lat, lon, province_name, amphur_name

# --- Count by province for KBANK ---

SELECT province_name, COUNT(*)

{"command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
import psycopg2
conn = psycopg2.connect('dbname=npa_kb')
cur = conn.cursor()

cur.execute('''
SELECT property_id, property_type_name, COALESCE(promotion_price, sell_price) AS price,
       useable_area, building_age, lat, lon, province_name, amphur_name, bedroom,
       CASE WHEN useable_area > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(promotion_price, sell_price)/useable_area)::numeric,0) ELSE NULL END AS psqm
FROM kbank_properties
WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours'
ORDER BY province_name, amphur_name, property_id
''')
rows = cur.fetchall()
print(f"TOTAL_NEW={len(rows)}")
for r in rows[:120]:
    print('|'.join('' if v is None else str(v) for v in r))

print('\n-- SONGKHLA --')
cur.execute('''
SELECT property_id, property_type_name, COALESCE(promotion_price, sell_price) AS price,
       useable_area, building_age, province_name, amphur_name,
       CASE WHEN useable_area > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(promotion_price, sell_price)/useable_area)::numeric,0) ELSE NULL END AS psqm
FROM kbank_properties
WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours'
  AND (province_name ILIKE '%สงขลา%' OR amphur_name ILIKE '%หาดใหญ่%' OR amphur_name ILIKE '%สะเดา%')
ORDER BY price
''')
for r in cur.fetchall():
    print('|'.join('' if v is None else str(v) for v in r))

cur.close(); conn.close()
PYEOF", "working_dir": "/Users/arsapolm/.nanobot-npa-guy/workspace", "timeout": 30}
